'''dayuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:iatrotechnique|iatrotechnique]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iatrotechnique|iatrotechnique]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dayuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæyihith|dæyihith]] || [[word:dæyihij|dæyihij]] || [[word:dæyihish|dæyihish]] || [[word:dæyihi|dæyihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dayuyuhuth|dayuyuhuth]] || [[word:dayuyuhuj|dayuyuhuj]] || [[word:dayuyuhush|dayuyuhush]] || [[word:dayuyuhu|dayuyuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dayuhuth|dayuhuth]] || [[word:dayuhuj|dayuhuj]] || [[word:dayuhush|dayuhush]] || [[word:dayuhu|dayuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dayufhuth|dayufhuth]] || [[word:dayufhuj|dayufhuj]] || [[word:dayufhush|dayufhush]] || [[word:dayufhuf|dayufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dayuhuthu|dayuhuthu]] || [[word:dayuhuju|dayuhuju]] || [[word:dayuhushu|dayuhushu]] || [[word:dayuhuku|dayuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dayuhuth|dayuhuth]] || [[word:dayuhuj|dayuhuj]] || [[word:dayuhush|dayuhush]] || [[word:dayuhu|dayuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dayuhuthul|dayuhuthul]] || [[word:dayuhujul|dayuhujul]] || [[word:dayuhushul|dayuhushul]] || [[word:dayuhukul|dayuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dayuhuthuthu|dayuhuthuthu]] || [[word:dayuhujuju|dayuhujuju]] || [[word:dayuhushushu|dayuhushushu]] || [[word:dayuhuku|dayuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dayuhuthun|dayuhuthun]] || [[word:dayuhujun|dayuhujun]] || [[word:dayuhushun|dayuhushun]] || [[word:dayuhukun|dayuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dayuhuthuoro|dayuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dayuhujuoro|dayuhujuoro]] || [[word:dayuhushuoro|dayuhushuoro]] || [[word:dayuhukuoro|dayuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
